title: Pastel Blue and Brown Balloons, 60PCS Light Cream Latex Helium Balloons Set, Macaron Baby White Apricot Beige Nude Party Balloon Teddy Bear Birthday Shower decor,beige,blue,white
features: 🎈 Light Blue and Brown Balloons Set - The baby blue white sand brown balloon kit has beautiful 12inch balloons in 4 different colors: 18pcs macaron blue balloons, 17pcs coffee balloons, 10pcs beige balloons, 15pcs apricot balloons and 1pc white balloon ribbon. To make your party most memorable. Vibrant colors add to the party's color theme, which can catch the attention of people and take as a photo props, giving your guests a surprise and impressive party.

🎈 High Quality Balloons - Our party balloon set made of durable latex material, which will stay inflated for a long time. Non-toxic and harmless for decorating at your party and supported with air or helium. These latex balloon be filled with helium will stay full for 4-6 hours, and you can blow them up with a mouth, pump or helium.

🎈 Mutiple Applications - Our party latex balloon decorations are perfect for birthday party, anniversary party, wedding, engagement, baby shower, gender reveal, bachelorette christmas, new year eve party decor and so on. And the balloons set can be used to create a mini balloon garland above a dessert table or entryway, a balloon banner, balloon bouquet, and more.

🎈 Easy to Use - Our balloons are high quality natural latex with good elasticity, you can easily blow up the balloon. The balloon set includes a ribbon, you can easily make a balloon bouquet, let your little ones run happily with it or let your family or friends take beautiful photos with the balloon bouquet.

🎈Safety and Use - Please Do not over-fill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating and sharp objects. You can pulld the balloon tail tightly to let it last longer after the balloon is knotted. Our latex balloons are reusable. ​If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us! Your problem can be solved within 24 hours.
description: Impress friends and guests alike with this Pastel Blue Brown Apricot Beige Balloons decorations that can make your party more atmospheric! This set of balloons includes a combination of colors that are perfect for any occasion, whether it's a baby shower, birthday party, or wedding celebration. The stunning colors in this set include Baby Blue and Brown Balloons, Light Blue Brown Cream Party Balloon, Blue White Sand Coffee Latex Balloons, making it a versatile option for any event. Item Details- Pack of 60 12inch Balloons (18pcs pastel blue balloons, 17pcs brown balloons, 10pcs cream balloons, 15pcs nude balloons) white balloon ribbon × 1 Balloon Specifications- 🌟 Material- Crafted from high-quality latex material, these balloons are durable and long-lasting, ensuring they will hold up throughout your event. You can easily inflate them with helium or air and tie them up with the included string. 🌟 Inflatable- Air or Helium. These Baby Blue Brown Beige Balloons are perfect for creating a stunning balloon arch, balloon garland, or balloon bouquet. You can mix and match the colors to create a unique and personalized look that matches your event's theme. They are also great for creating balloon centerpieces or adding a pop of color to any room. Great For- Whether you're hosting a baby shower, teddy bear theme party, summer theme party, birthday party, anniversary, engagement party, or wedding celebration, these light blue white sand cocoa balloons are a must-have decoration. The soft and soothing colors of these balloons will create a calming and relaxing atmosphere that your guests will love. Warm Tips: Please do not over-inflate the balloon to avoid pop. Please keep the balloon away from high temperature or sharp objects.
